case_title: CHARLES MICHAEL GEURIN VS. BRYAN BIRMINGHAM

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF APR-13-2016 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF APR-13-2016 BY JUDGE PRO TEM MICHAEL MAU. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT. PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: MICHAEL MAU. CLERK: J. BERTELSEN. NOT REPORTED. (506)
STIPULATION FOR JUDGE PRO TEM FILED BY PLAINTIFF GEURIN, CHARLES MICHAEL
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF APR-13-2016 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF GEURIN, CHARLES MICHAEL RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BIRMINGHAM, BRYAN $500.00 PRINCIPAL, $90.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $590.00, COURT FINDS 1/3RD NEGLIGENCE ON PLAINTIFF, DEFENDANT AND ON MUNI (S.F.
